title: Excise Tariff (Exemption) (Dar es Salaam City Council) (Fire Fighting Equipment and one unit of Land Rover Ambulance) Order, 2003
title_en: Excise Tariff (Exemption) (Dar es Salaam City Council) (Fire Fighting Equipment and one unit of Land Rover Ambulance) Order, 2003

provisions.title: Title and Commencement
provisions.content: This Order may be cited as The Excise Tariff (Exemption) (Dar es Salaam City Council) (Fire Fighting Equipment and one unit of Land Rover Ambulance) Order, 2003 and shall be deemed to have come into operation on the first day of October, 2002.

provisions.title: Exemption
provisions.content: Exemption Subject to the conditions specified in paragraph 3 of this Order, the whole of the import duty payable on the equipment and motor vehicle specified in the Schedule to this Order, imported or purchased prior to clearance through customs by or on behalf of Dar es Salaam City Coun­cil is hereby exempted.

provisions.title: Condition for Exemption
provisions.content: The exemption granted under this Order shall cease to have effect and the excise duty shall become due and be payable as if this Order had not been made if the said equipment and motor vehicle are transferred, sold or disposed of in any way to another person not entitled to enjoy similar privileges as are conferred under this Order. Schedule List of fire fighting equipment and motor vehicle Item Description Quantity 1. Portable pump P382M 2 2. Nozzle 2 3. Nozzle tip (50mm) NM-2 2 4. Delivery Hose (50mm x 20) 30 5. Suction hose (65mm x 6m) 2 6. Adaptor (65mm - 50mm) 2 7. Adaptor (50mm - 50mm JM) 2 8. Glove (Kevlar color navy blue) 30 9. Water tank 2200L 2 10. Portable winch (TU-16) with 20m wire rope 1 11. Looped wire rope (WRI2) 12mm x 3m 1 12. Engine cutter (K650-active III) 1 13. Spare blade for K650-active 11 (1Q pieces) 1 14. Manual oil pressure rescue tool set (Black hawk RS-3) 1 15. Rescue sling (R430) 1 16. Rescue rope (12mm x 200m) 1 17. Pulley (KT-02) 1 18. Carabineer (Steel, O-type) 20 19. Rcsusci-Anne (Skill guide model) 1 2.0. Spare lung for Resusci-Arine (disposal type, 24 pieces) 1 21. Laredal pocket mask (for CPR with hard case) 30 22. Cotton wipe (with alcohol disinfecting, 2Q0 packs each) 3 23. Magic plaster (Neo-V-cast) 1 24. Triangle bandage (Type-A) 100 25. Splint (Ex-large) 10 26. Splint (Large) 10 27. Splint (Middle) 10 28.
